title: Upright sleep system
abstract: Upright sleep system (10) includes base pillow (12) and top pillow (14). The base pillow (12) includes tapered shape, including top edge having top edge thickness and bottom edge having bottom edge thickness less than the top edge thickness. User may rest his/her head against top pillow (14) or base (12) during use, and base pillow (12) supports both top pillow (14) and user's torso and arms. By utilizing the upright sleep system the users head, neck, chin, torso and arms can all be supported. The base pillow (12) and tether (40) provide stable support for the top pillow (14) to prevent the top pillow (14) from becoming dislodged while the user rests. A base passage (30) in the base pillow (12) is shaped to receive user's arm/arms to further enhance comfort and support. In some embodiments, the base (12) and top pillow (14) include an inflatable, airtight chamber.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1 . An upright sleep apparatus, comprising: a base pillow having a top edge, a bottom edge, a first side edge, and a second side edge, the top edge having a top edge thickness and a top edge length, the bottom edge having a bottom edge thickness and a bottom edge length, the base pillow including a front pillow face and a back pillow face; a substantially flat platform region defined on the top edge of the base pillow; a top pillow in spaced relation to the base pillow, the top pillow shaped to rest against the platform region on the top edge of the base pillow; and a passage defined entirely through the base pillow from the front pillow face to the back pillow face, wherein the top edge thickness of the base pillow is greater than the bottom edge thickness of the base pillow. 2. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the top edge thickness of the base pillow is approximately twice the bottom edge thickness of the base pillow. 3. The apparatus of claim 1 wherein the first and second side edges of the base pillow include substantially the same shape. 4. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the first and second side edges of the base pillow form a trapezoid shape. 5. The apparatus of claim 1 , further comprising a cinch disposed on the top pillow. 6. The apparatus of claim 5, wherein the cinch is operable to restrict a portion of the top pill 7. The apparatus of claim 6, further comprising a cinch lock disposed on the cinch to secure the top pillow in a restricted bow-tie shape. 8. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the base pillow is inflatable. 9. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the base pillow is compressible. 10. The apparatus of claim 1 , the base pillow further comprising a base pillow filler disposed inside the base pillow. 1 1 . The apparatus of claim 10, wherein the base pillow filler comprises a foam material. 12. The apparatus of claim 1 , further comprising a base valve on the base pillow. 13. The apparatus of claim 1 , further comprising a base shell on the base pillow surrounding the base pillow filler, wherein the base shell is an airtight material. 14. The apparatus of claim 1 , further comprising a tether having a first tether end secured to the base pillow and a second tether end secured to the top pillow. 15. The apparatus of claim 1 , the top pillow further comprising a top pillow filler, wherein the top pillow is inflatable. 16. The apparatus of claim 15, wherein the top pillow filler comprises a foam.
